channel.title: 番剧每日新闻RSS
channel.description: 自动聚合：新番、定档、PV、STAFF、CAST、延期资讯 | Auto-updated anime news aggregator

item.title: [动画][CAST][STAFF][发表] Anime News Network Im Dating a Dark Summoner! 动画 宣布 声优阵容, 制作阵容, October Debut
item.description: Seiya Miyajima (Umayon, BanG Dream! Girls Band Party! Pico) directs, writes shorts ― The staff for the short anime of Shaoh's I'm Dating a Dark Summoner! (Dark Summoner to Dekiteiru) manga presented... | 来源: ANN | 原文: I'm Dating a Dark Summoner! Anime Announces Cast, Staff, October Debut

item.title: [剧场版] Anime News Network Akiwashi的 Living a World Without Magic Music Video Has Animated Film Project Works
item.description: Kasagi Labo has overseas plans for film of indie music video ― Illustrator Akiwashi and Euluca Lab's self-produced music video "Living in a World Without Magic" ("Mahō no Nai Sekai de Ikiru to Iu... | 来源: ANN | 原文: Akiwashi's 'Living in a World Without Magic' Music Video Has Animated Film Project in the Works

item.title: [动画][PV][公开] Anime News Network Bungo Stray Dogs Wan! 2 Anime的 Main 宣传视频 Video 公开 Ending Song, July 2 Debut
item.description: Kenshō Ono performs "Bokura" song (as Ryūnosuke Akutagawa) ― Kadokawa presented the main promotional video for Bungo Stray Dogs Wan! 2, the second season anime based on Kanaineko's Bungo Stray Dogs... | 来源: ANN | 原文: Bungo Stray Dogs Wan! 2 Anime's Main Promo Video Unveils Ending Song, July 2 Debut

item.title: [动画][剧场版] Anime News Network Sentai Filmworks Screens 4K Restoration Ninja Scroll 动画 Film October U.S., Canada
item.description: Anime's 4K version screens on October 4, 5, 7 ― Sentai Filmworks announced on Thursday that it will screen the 4K version of Ninja Scroll (Jūbei Ninpūchō) anime film on October 4, 5, and 7 in the... | 来源: ANN | 原文: Sentai Filmworks Screens 4K Restoration of Ninja Scroll Anime Film in October in U.S., Canada

item.title: [动画][续作] Anime News Network Mr. Osomatsu 季度 4 动画 Streams Unaired 13th Episode
item.description: Crunchyroll launched "The Matsuno Ten" episode on Thursday ― The official X/Twitter account for the Mr. Osomatsu anime announced on Friday that the previously unaired 13th episode of the show's... | 来源: ANN | 原文: Mr. Osomatsu Season 4 Anime Streams Unaired 13th Episode
